/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -O2  -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX13.3.sdk -bundle -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -undefined dynamic_lookup -L/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/c++ -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/lib/c++ -o ../python/needle/backend_ndarray/ndarray_backend_metal.cpython-39-darwin.so CMakeFiles/ndarray_backend_metal.dir/src/ndarray_backend_metal.cpp.o
